PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Bruce Samson.

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that the Brother of the Decedent went into the house, that he found the documents and found that he had not been named, that he left the documents there for Joyce to find and that Joyce left them at the house. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is set at $585,000.00.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.
